name: jmfl-morning-digest-multi-ticker
notes: Morning brief covering 3 tickers with overlapping themes. Tests digest splitting + per-ticker rating/TP extraction.

envelope.subject: JMFL Morning Brief 22 Apr 2026
envelope.bodyText:
JMFL Morning Brief — 22 Apr 2026.

MARUTI: Sell. PT ₹11,000 from ₹11,500. PV competition intensifies; H1 share loss expected. Risks: pricing-led volume.

LT: Buy. PT ₹4,500. Order book strong at ₹5.2tn; capex discipline intact.

TCS: Buy. PT ₹4,200 from ₹4,050. Margins expand on BFSI demand.
